ok..
Healthcheck several errors due to NBI => DB connexion issue, a priori not related to SDC 
=> I will create a JIRA as it is not the first time we have this error
as NBI is declared in small it explains the errors in small/medium/full
without NBI errors HC will 100% OK

for E2E tests we know that there are still limitations on Azure
BUT we can see that the onboarding part of basic Vm and freeradius_nbi tests is OK (up to distribution OK)
it is failing for clearwater_ims - known issue linked to the race condition

the error on 5gbulk is also known test is 8/9
and pnf-registrate is OK

so for me it is OK
